name: sidequests
description: Helper tools born as side quests.

plugins.name: sidequests
plugins.description: Helper tools: photo-reconciler (Google Photos -> iCloud, no dupes), source-finder (identify a song/source from a clip), session-context (memory and state continuity across agent sessions), steam-shortcut (add a non-Steam game to the Steam library), durable-claude-automation (Windows: make scheduled Claude runs and the remote session survive desktop-app restarts/updates/crashes), feature (full agile-scrum SDLC pipeline for building features), bugfix (lightweight scrum loop for tracking and fixing bugs), and usage-limit-guard (survive Claude usage limits + resume an autonomous loop from durable repo state).
